structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-09-18 NOVA Increases Conforming Loan Limits
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-09-18 08:40:45-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

In anticipation of an increase to the Conforming Loan Limit later this year, effective for loans locked on or after 09/18/2025, NOVA is now supporting increased loan limits on Standard Conventional Loans for 1-4 unit properties and VA loans for 1-unit properties.  Please note that the FHFA has not officially confirmed the new Conforming Loan Limit for 2026.  We expect an official FHFA announcement of the new 2026 loan limits in November of 2025 and will provide updates at that time.

 

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	Loans more than current 2025 county limits, and up to NOVA’s expanded loan limit, are now eligible on NOVA’s Conventional & VA standard balance loan products.
*	AUS will return an ineligible result. NOVA will accept Ineligible findings due only to the loan amount being more than the 2025 limits.

	*	PIWs not permitted.

*	Due to loans not being eligible for purchase by the agencies until 2026, adjustments to price will be included for expanded loan amounts
*	MI Companies have not yet announced whether they will support the expanded loan limits.
*	NOVA’s expanded conforming limits are currently available in Polly for the following loan amounts:

 

Property Unit Count

Expanded Loan Limit

1-Unit Conventional & VA

$819,000 

2-Unit Conventional

$1,048,500 

3-Unit Conventional

$1,268,000 

4-Unit Conventional

$1,575,000 

 

 

ATTACHMENTS

*	Social Media Content

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
